info.title: Raygun API
info.description: Raygun's API allows you to access your Raygun data so that you can display, manipulate and process it in other tools, scripts and applications. Access applications, error groups, deployments, sessions, pages, customers, and source maps.

get.description: List applications for the plan(s) and the user which the token has access to.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return.

get.description: Get an application by its identifier.
Get an application by its API key.

post.description: Regenerates the API key for the given application.

get.description: List the plan(s) which the token belongs to.
List teams for the plan(s) and the user which the token has access to.
Get a team by its identifier.
List invitations for the plan(s) and the user which the token has access to.
Get an invitation by its identifier.

post.description: Send an invitation to a user.

get.description: List deployments for an application.

post.description: Create a deployment for an application.

get.description: Get the latest deployment for an application.
Get a deployment by its identifier.

put.description: Update the details of a deployment.

get.description: List error groups for an application.
Get an error group by its identifier.

post.description: Set an error group to resolved, optionally with a version, and to discard from previous versions.
Ignore an error group. If it occurs again it will become active.
Permanently ignore an error group. Optionally specify to discard future occurrences.
Add a comment to an error group.

get.description: List source maps for an application.

post.description: Upload a source map for an application.

delete.description: Deletes all source maps for an application.

get.description: Get the metadata of a source map by its identifier.

put.description: Updates the metadata of a source map.

get.description: List sessions for an application.
Get a session by its identifier.
List pages for an application.
Get a page by its identifier.
List customers for an application.
Get a customer by its identifier.

get.summary: List error groups for latest deployment
get.description: List error groups from the latest deployment for an application.

get.summary: List error groups for a specific deployment
get.description: List error groups from a specific deployment for an application.
Get time-series error metrics for an application.
Get time-series page performance metrics for an application.
Get histogram page performance metrics for an application.

bearerAuth.description: Bearer authentication using a Personal Access Token (PAT).
